mapper.sql:
where p.status = 'PUBLISHED'
and upper(p.city) like concat('%', upper(#{city}), '%')
and upper(b.boilerType) = upper(#{boilerType})
and b.brand like concat('%', #{brand}, '%')
and b.fuelType like concat('%', #{fuelType}, '%')

where 1 = 1
and p.sellerId = #{sellerId}
and p.status = #{status}
and upper(p.city) like concat('%', upper(#{city}), '%')
and upper(b.boilerType) = upper(#{boilerType})
and b.brand like concat('%', #{brand}, '%')
and b.fuelType like concat('%', #{fuelType}, '%')
mapper.insert: insert into post ( postId, sellerId, title, price, description, status, publishTime, updateTime, viewCount, mediaFiles, aiValuationRange, city, boilerId ) values ( #{postId}, #{sellerId}, #{title}, #{price}, #{description}, #{status}, #{publishTime}, #{updateTime}, #{viewCount}, #{mediaFiles}, #{aiValuationRange}, #{city}, #{boilerId} )
mapper.update: update post set status = #{status}, updateTime = CURDATE() where postId = #{postId}
mapper.select:
select p.* from post p inner join boiler b on p.boilerId = b.boilerId
order by p.updateTime desc, p.publishTime desc limit #{limit}
select count(1) from post p where p.status = 'PUBLISHED'
select count(1) from post p inner join boiler b on p.boilerId = b.boilerId
select p.* from post p where p.sellerId = #{sellerId} order by p.updateTime desc, p.publishTime desc, p.postId desc
select count(1) from post p left join boiler b on p.boilerId = b.boilerId

select p.price as price, b.ratedThermalPower as ratedThermalPower, b.evaporationCapacity as evaporationCapacity, b.tonnage as tonnage, b.thermalEfficiency as thermalEfficiency, b.manufactureDate as manufactureEndDate, b.boilerType as boilerType, b.fuelType as fuelType, b.noxEmissions as noxEmissions, b.workingPressure as workingPressure, b.footprintArea as footprintArea from post p join boiler b on p.boilerId = b.boilerId where p.status = 'PUBLISHED' and p.price is not null order by p.updateTime desc, p.postId desc limit #{limit}
